parkzone.title: Technical Case Study - ParkZone
parkzone.subtitle: Full frontend redesign and technical prototype of ParkZone’s public website. Focus on building a scalable, component-based architecture using a modern frontend stack and headless CMS setup.
description: This project is a full frontend redesign and technical prototype of ParkZone’s public website.
The focus was not only on UX and visual redesign, but on building a scalable, component-based architecture using a modern frontend stack and headless CMS setup.
The prototype simulates a production-ready structure with dynamic content, API integration, reusable components, and a structured booking/payment flow.

wait.title: Wait - Food ordering platform
wait.subtitle: Full-stack food ordering platform based on Wolt where users can browse restaurants, view menu items, and place orders. The system supports multiple roles, each with their own functionality and dashboards.
description: This project is a full-stack food ordering platform where users can browse restaurants, view menu items, and place orders. The system supports multiple roles including customers, restaurants, partners, and administrators, each with their own functionality and dashboards.

The backend is built with Python and Flask, using MySQL for persistent data storage and Redis for session management and basket state. The system is containerized using Docker Compose and runs as a multi-service architecture with Flask, MySQL, Redis, and Nginx.
The project also includes automated testing, database seeding, and environment-based configuration for development, testing, and production.
features: **Pagination and search functionality** for scalable data queries.
**Admin dashboard** for managing users, restaurants, and items with options to block or delete entries.

shopify.title: AI-Powered Shopify Search Widget
shopify.subtitle: An AI-powered search widget for Shopify stores that interprets natural language queries to generate dynamic results pages with personalized product recommendations.
description: This project implements an AI-powered search widget for Shopify stores that enhances product discovery through natural language queries.

Instead of relying on traditional keyword-based search, the system analyzes user prompts to understand intent and generates personalized product inspiration pages containing relevant product recommendations. The widget integrates with Shopify via the Admin API and can be embedded directly into existing webshops without requiring changes to the storefront layout or design.
The primary focus of the project is backend architecture, API integration, and AI-assisted search logic, developed as part of a bachelor's degree in web development.
features: **AI-assisted product search** using OpenAI to interpret natural language queries.
**PostgreSQL full-text search** for ranking and retrieving relevant products.
**Shopify Admin API and GraphQL integration** for product synchronization and dynamic page generation.
**Automatic synchronization** of Shopify products, variants, collections, and media.
**Database upsert architecture** for efficient Shopify data synchronization.

snake.title: Optimizing Neural Agents with a Genetic Algorithm Approach
snake.subtitle: This project uses a Genetic Algorithm to evolve neural network–controlled Snake agents that learn survival and apple collection in a classic Snake game.
description: This project explores the use of a genetic algorithm to evolve intelligent Snake agents that maximize apple collection and survival. Neural networks act as controllers, while genetic operations such as selection, crossover, and mutation guide learning.

Each agent uses a feedforward neural network mapping 24 input features — distances to walls, body, and food — into 4 movement outputs. The network includes an input layer, a hidden layer, and an output layer.

The results show that with tuned fitness functions and input features, agents develop increasingly sophisticated behavior, suggesting that evolutionary algorithms can produce adaptive agents in simple game environments.
